# Core workflow: init → workspace → commit → verify

# Initialize a git repo
exec git init
exec git config user.email test@test.com
exec git config user.name Test

# Initialize GOT
exec $GOT_BIN init
exists .got/got.db

# Create workspace
exec $GOT_BIN workspace create test-workspace --description test-workspace --tags test,ci
stdout 'Workspace created'

# Verify workspace listed
exec $GOT_BIN workspace list
stdout 'test-workspace'

# Create a file and commit
exec sh -c 'echo hello > main.go'
exec git add .
exec $GOT_BIN commit -m feat:initial-code
stdout 'Committed'

# Verify workspace shows the commit
exec $GOT_BIN workspace show test-workspace
stdout 'test-workspace'

# Create a decision
exec $GOT_BIN decision create --title UseGo --context Performance --decision Go-chosen --no-interactive
stdout 'Decision created'

# Verify decision
exec $GOT_BIN decision list
stdout 'UseGo'

# Create a note
exec $GOT_BIN note add Remember-tests --workspace test-workspace
stdout 'Note added'

# Search for the decision
exec $GOT_BIN search Go
stdout 'UseGo'

# Health check
exec $GOT_BIN health
stdout 'All checks passed'
